description: This file defines a Java record named NotificationRequest used to model provider-agnostic notification requests within the BusinessLoanAPI project. It contains fields related to business events, application identifiers, applicant contact details, decision information, and event timestamp.

classes.name: NotificationRequest
classes.description: A record representing a notification request, encapsulating details such as event type, draft/application ID, applicant info, decision info, and event timestamp.
